query:
ALTER TABLE `interview_sessions` ADD COLUMN `candidate_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidates` (
  `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `organization_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `email` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `phone` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `linkedin_url` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `github_url` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `portfolio_url` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `source` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `source_detail` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `current_role` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `current_company` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `years_experience` INT NULL,
  `salary_expectation` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `notice_period` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `pipeline_stage` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'applied',
  `rejection_reason` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `tags` JSON NOT NULL,
  `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  `updated_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidate_documents` (
  `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `candidate_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `type` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `filename` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `mime_type` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `content` TEXT NOT NULL,
  `raw_data` MEDIUMBLOB NULL,
  `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidate_intelligence` (
  `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `candidate_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `type` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `data` JSON NOT NULL,
  `source_text` TEXT NULL,
  `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidate_notes` (
  `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `candidate_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `user_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `user_name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `content` TEXT NOT NULL,
  `type` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidate_references` (
  `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `candidate_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `referee_name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `referee_email` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `referee_phone` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `referee_relation` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `referee_company` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `status` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `token` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `responses` JSON NULL,
  `ai_analysis` JSON NULL,
  `completed_at` DATETIME(3) NULL,
  `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE INDEX `candidate_references_token_key`(`token`)
);

  `rejection_reason` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `tags` JSON NOT NULL,
  `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidate_documents` (
  `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,

  `type` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,

  `content` TEXT NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidate_intelligence` (
  `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `candidate_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `type` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `data` JSON NOT NULL,
  `source_text` TEXT NULL,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidate_notes` (

  `type` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidate_references` (

  `candidate_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `referee_name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `referee_email` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `referee_phone` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `referee_relation` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
  `referee_company` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `status` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `token` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
  `responses` JSON NULL,
  `ai_analysis` JSON NULL,
  `completed_at` DATETIME(3) NULL,
  `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE INDEX `candidate_references_token_key`(`token`)
);
